creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can't install the `static':
[14-default] Installing mg-static-20241008,1...
pkg-static: Fail to create temporary file for /rescue/mg:Read-only file system
*** Error code 1

Could you please check it? And please check `portlint -abct' (ports-mgmt/portlint) and portclippy, portfmt (ports-mgmt/portfmt) linters?
